title: Incident Investigation Manager
description:
• Major Incidents (P1/P2)
  • Handling escalations

About Our Client

The organisation is a reputable player in the financial services sector, with a strong presence and significant operations. It offers a collaborative and structured environment, aiming to deliver excellence in all areas of its business.

Job Description

  • Lead and manage the investigation of technical incidents within the organisation.
  • Collaborate with cross-functional teams to resolve issues efficiently.
  • Develop and implement incident management processes and protocols.
  • Provide detailed reports and documentation on incident findings and resolutions.
  • Ensure compliance with industry regulations and internal policies.
  • Identify trends and recommend strategies to prevent future incidents.
  • Communicate effectively with stakeholders to provide updates and insights.
  • Support the technology department in maintaining system integrity and reliability.

The Successful Applicant

A successful Incident Investigation Manager should have:

  • Proven expertise in handling technical incidents in the financial services industry.
  • Strong understanding of technology systems and infrastructure.
  • Excellent problem-solving and analytical skills.
  • Experience in drafting detailed reports and documentation.
  • Knowledge of relevant industry standards and regulations.
  • Ability to work collaboratively with cross-functional teams.
  • Effective communication and stakeholder management skills.

What's on Offer

  • Opportunity to work in the financial services industry in Singapore.
  • Engagement in a temporary role with a focus on technology and incident management.
  • Chance to contribute to maintaining and improving system reliability.



If you are ready to take on this exciting challenge as an Incident Investigation Manager, we encourage you to apply today!

Contact
